title: Why did Jenny want to leave the wedding reception?

meanings.usage: 指正式场合的宴会或聚会
表达对某人的尊敬和赞赏
指人的幽默性格或幽默的东西
指在公共场合的正式发言
修饰动词，表示做事的仔细程度
表达因期望落空而产生的情绪
表示从某事中获得乐趣
表示因感到有趣而发出笑声

phrases.usage: 指拥有很多的社交圈子，朋友很多

examples.en: He has a large circle of friends.

phrases.usage: 发表演讲，在公共场合进行正式发言

examples.en: He was asked to make a speech at the wedding.
examples.zh: 他被邀请在婚礼上发表演讲。

phrases.usage: 令他惊讶的是，表示出乎意料

examples.en: To his surprise, she refused the invitation.
examples.zh: 令他惊讶的是，她拒绝了邀请。

phrases.usage: 一...就...，表示两个动作紧接着发生

examples.en: As soon as he finished, Jenny left.

phrases.usage: 这类事情，某种类型的事物

examples.en: This is the sort of thing that he loves.
He did as his daughter asked.
examples.zh: 他按照女儿的要求做了。

examples.en: They talked on the way home.
examples.zh: 他们在回家的路上交谈。

phrases.usage: 大量的，许多的，后接可数名词复数

examples.en: He told a large number of funny stories.
examples.zh: 他讲了很多有趣的故事。

examples.en: Of course, it was a great success.
examples.zh: 当然，这是一次巨大的成功。

examples.en: He was a little disappointed by this.
examples.zh: 他对这件事感到有点失望。

grammar.title: 直接引语和间接引语（Direct and Indirect Speech）
grammar.definition: 当转述别人的话时，可以使用直接引用原话，或将原话转换为转述句。间接引语中，人称、时态、时间状语等通常需要相应变化。
grammar.structure: 主句 + 连词 + 主语 + 动词 + 其他成分；人称变化：第一人称→第二人称，第二人称→第一人称；时态后退（过去时→过去完成时等）
grammar.usage: 用于转述他人说过的话，使叙述更加流畅自然。在口语和书面语中都常用。

examples.en: She said she hadn't enjoyed the speech.
examples.zh: 她说她不喜欢那个演讲。

examples.en: He asked her why she hadn't enjoyed it.
She told him that she did not like to see so many people laughing at him.
examples.zh: 她告诉他她不喜欢看到那么多人在笑他。

grammar.title: as soon as 的用法
grammar.definition: 连词词组，表示'一...就...'，强调两个动作紧接着发生。
grammar.structure: as soon as + 主语 + 动词...，主句
grammar.usage: 用于描述先后发生的两个动作，第一个动作一发生，第二个动作立即开始。常用于叙述故事的发展。

examples.en: As soon as he had finished, Jenny told him she wanted to go home.
examples.zh: 他一讲完，Jenny就告诉他她想回家。

examples.en: As soon as I arrived, I called my mother.
examples.zh: 我一到达就给我妈妈打了电话。

grammar.title: 过去完成时（Past Perfect Tense）
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时刻之前已经完成的动作或状态。由had + 过去分词构成。
grammar.structure: 主语 + had + 过去分词
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去的过去，即两个过去的动作中，先发生的动作用过去完成时。当after, as soon as等连词引导时间状语从句时，主句用过去完成时，从句用一般过去时。

examples.en: As soon as he had finished, Jenny told him...
He had included a large number of funny stories in the speech.
examples.zh: 他在演讲中加入了大量有趣的故事。

sentencePatterns.pattern: Everybody admires him for his + 名词

original.en: Everybody admires him for his great sense of humour.
original.zh: 每个人都钦佩他的幽默感。

imitations.en: Everybody admires her for her kindness.
imitations.zh: 每个人都钦佩她的善良。

imitations.en: We admire him for his courage.

sentencePatterns.pattern: To his + 情绪名词, she + 动词过去式

original.en: To his surprise, she said she hadn't.
original.zh: 令他惊讶的是，她说她没有（喜欢）。

imitations.en: To his disappointment, he failed the exam.
imitations.zh: 令他失望的是，他考试不及格。

imitations.en: To her surprise, everyone agreed with her.
imitations.zh: 令她惊讶的是，每个人都同意她的观点。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + asked + 宾语 + if/why/what + 陈述句/疑问句

original.en: He asked her why this was so.

imitations.en: She asked him if he was tired.
They asked me why I was late.

sentencePatterns.pattern: This is the sort of thing that + 主语 + loves/hates

original.en: This is the sort of thing that Jeremy loves.

imitations.en: This is the sort of thing that she hates.
That is the sort of book that I enjoy.
imitations.zh: 那正是我喜欢的那种书。
